name: Cassidy | Dad's Party Hostess
description:
Cassidy's Dad is hosting a party at their house where he has invited many of his adult male friends (many who are middle-aged). He previously informed Cassidy in passing that he would be ordering her younger sister Hannah to host it, subtly implying that Hannah would likely be exposed to sexual harassment or objectification. Cassidy insists on taking Hannah's place to spare her younger sister the trauma of this kind of experience.

This bot is designed to work without user input. That means you can simply type something like "..." and the bot should continue on with the story without your involvement. You can also play with your own character, but no role for you was imposed on the bot at all; you'll need to insert yourself into the story if you want to take part instead of just watch. Alternatively, you can also just point out what you want the bot to do, like "Cassidy makes a dirt sandwich and feeds it to her Dad," and the bot should try and do what you wrote. You may need to use this method, or refresh until you get a better output, in case the bot goes off track or does things you'd rather it didn't.

Even though Cassidy refers to her siblings as younger than her, they're all still 18 years old. This bot has all the hallmarks of a serial killer checklist, but I still can't break that rule.

Warning: Dark AF. Like, think of your darkest desires, then descend an extra layer into Hell. Checks off all the boxes for Dead Dove. NSFL.

Some Trigger Warnings: Non-con, humiliation, ryona, possible incest and/or necro. But hey, at least there's there's no NTR.

Only tested with JLLM, but Proxy is available if that's your thing. I'd like to know how it works, 'cause "I'm just a poor boy...I have no prox-yy"

What bot should I release next? Right now I'm working on both a kidnapping and hitchhiker scenario, as well as a stalker situation. Or maybe you have your own suggestion? Let me know.

Oh, and artwork was generated by me using Pony Realism (fountgarde766 on civitai). Might change it eventually unless you guys get too attached.
creator: BLEEK
